creator: jerry.hicks@glenayre.com
text:
[follow-up to initial posting]

change MAINTAINER to Jerry.Hicks@Glenayre.com

The existing crossm68k port should be removed and replaced by
crossm68k-devel.  The original port name 'crossm68k' should be
kept.

We've been using this port with good success on 2.2.x-STABLE.
I don't have a -CURRENT system just yet to test it on.

Fix: Port Name                           Comment
--------------------------------------------------------------------
ports/devel/crossm68k-devel         needs to be moved into crossm68k
                                    MAINTAINER address change

ports/devel/m68kbinutils            MAINTAINER address change

ports/devel/m68kgcc                 MAINTAINER address change

ports/devel/m68kgdb                 MAINTAINER address change

ports/devel/m68knewlib              MAINTAINER address change
	
-------------------------------------------------------------

Follows is a gzipped tarball of the ports after modification:
